figures.caption: FIGURE 4: Complete variational quantum classifier obtained by composing the ZZFeatureMap with the hardwareefficient QNN ansatz. The feature-encoding block embeds classical data into a quantum feature space, followed by a trainable variational circuit used for supervised classification.

FIGURE 2: ZZFeatureMap used for encoding classical input features into a quantum Hilbert space. The feature map introduces parameterized single-qubit rotations and pairwise ZZ entanglement to capture correlations among input features.
